name: Choco-Mint Cream Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the gelatin, sugar, salt, and chocolate bits in the top of a double boiler.
2. Beat the egg yolks slightly with the milk; stir into the gelatin mixture.
3. Cook over boiling water, stirring constantly, until the chocolate is melted and the mixture is slightly thickened.
4. Remove from heat; stir in the rice; chill until the mixture is quite cold and has begun to set.
5. Beat 1/2 cup heavy cream until stiff.
6. Beat egg whites until foamy; add 2 tablespoons sugar and continue to beat until stiff peaks form.
7. Break up the mint jelly with a fork; fold into the chocolate mixture with cream and egg whites.
8. Chill until the mixture begins to set.
9. Spoon into 6 sherbet glasses.
10. Whip the remaining heavy cream; beat in 1 tablespoon mint jelly; spoon over the pudding in sherbet.
11. Top with additional mint jelly, if desired.
Makes 6 servings. 441 calories per serving
